openings.title: A&F Co. Design Sophomore Summit - Summer 2026

gap_explanation: The most critical gaps are customerservice, teamwork, and communication, as these are foundational for client-facing roles in arts-media, such as event coordination or gallery management. Without these, you'll struggle to collaborate with teams and engage audiences effectively. To close these gaps, volunteer for group projects or take a short course in interpersonal skills.
